data.goal: Craft wooden pickaxe and get cobblestone
data.reasoning: Wooden pickaxe already crafted and in inventory. Need to equip it, move to stone, and dig three stones. Stone at (100,144,-32) is within 4.5 blocks, so move_to is not needed for that block; but the other two stones are at (100,144,-31) and (100,144,-33) which are also within 4.5? Actually distance from current position (96,144,-32) to (100,144,-32) is 4, to (100,144,-31) is sqrt(4^2+1^2)=4.12, to (100,144,-33) is also 4.12. All within 4.5, so no move_to needed. Equip pickaxe first, then dig each stone.

subtasks.rationale: Need to equip pickaxe to dig stone.

subtasks.rationale: Dig stone to get cobblestone.

subtasks.title: Dig second stone at (100,144,-31)
subtasks.rationale: Dig second stone.

subtasks.title: Dig third stone at (100,144,-33)
subtasks.rationale: Dig third stone.
